scripts.migrate: node --import dotenv/config -e "import db from './src/db/index.js'; db.migrate.latest().then(() => { console.log('Migrations complete'); process.exit(0); }).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });"
scripts.seed: node --import dotenv/config -e "import db from './src/db/index.js'; db.seed.run().then(() => { console.log('Seeds complete'); process.exit(0); }).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });"
